data.name: To Back a Bird into a Corner
data.summary: Keiji and his friends struggle to gain the upper hand in the battle against the powerful Devil, Yuji. Keiji sets a strategy in motion that involves him sacrificing himself. Meanwhile, Hikari begins to make his move.

data.name: Heaven Help Us
data.summary: Hannah faces one of the most challenging deliveries of her career. Frost navigates demanding times.

data.name: Thank You
data.summary: Severide and Kidd welcome a surprise visitor. Herrmann and Cindy renew their vows. Mouch receives some encouraging news.

data.name: Rain Check for Tomorrow
data.summary: When a volatile blaze at the Pineville Dam triggers a cascading infrastructure failure, Station 42 races to execute a series of perilous rescues.

data.name: Kym Marsh, Jenny Ryan, Babatunde Aleshe, Chris McCausland, Michael Dapaah, Chizzy Akudolu
data.summary: Bradley Walsh hosts the revival of the comedy quiz show, in which Kym Marsh, Jenny Ryan, Babatunde Aleshe, Chris McCausland, Michael Dapaah and Chizzy Akudolu fill in the blanks to help contestants win some brilliant prizes.

data.name: Episode 28
data.summary: The Troubles in Northern Ireland, smallpox, lucid dreaming, and the films of Tim Burton. So yes, a perfectly normal mix for another perfectly normal show.

data.name: Episode 29
data.summary: Tonight, Brooklyn Nine-Nine, the Brisbane Broncos, the video game Jet Lag, and the surprisingly smoky history of Cuban Cigars - that's a lot to inhale in the one episode.

data.name: Episode 30
data.summary: Our weekly winners are back with two minutes of general knowledge, plus the dreaded slow burn round. Tonight's slow burn topics are a Musician, a Sport, a Character and a Country.

data.name: North Yorkshire
data.summary: Richie Anderson is house-hunting in North Yorkshire with Sarah. who is on the hunt for a beautiful stone cottage in a thriving community. With a budget of £220,000 and support from her son Christian, they explore a range of tempting, characterful homes. Richie also visits a young couple who have embraced rural life on their farm, where they've started what they claim is the world's first egg restaurant.

data.name: Geena Davis, Lisa Ann Walter
data.summary: GEENA DAVIS is here to talk about "The Boroughs," and LISA ANN WALTER chats about ABC's "Abbott Elementary." Plus, it's "Shopping Day at Live" with SHANNON DOHERTY, and the "Cooking School" series continues with viewer tips in "The Inbox."

data.name: Tristan Williams Vs. Nishi Kantamneni Vs. Anne Benjaminson, Show # 9499.
data.summary: Tristan Williams / Originally Lincoln, Nebraska, Data Scientist; Nishi Kantamneni / Originally Pleasanton, California, Platform Engineer; Anne Benjaminson / Originally New York, New York, Foreign Service Officer.

data.name: Nick Lachey, Melba Wilson
data.summary: NICK LACHEY swings by for a chat about "Perfect Match," and ABC's "American Idol" runner-up performs. Plus, the "Cooking School" series concludes with MELBA WILSON.

data.name: Returning Champion Vs. Chayce Griffith Vs. Valerie Fulton, Show # 9500.
data.summary: Returning Champion; Chayce Griffith / Originally Saline, Michigan, Professor Of Tree Fruit Physiology; Valerie Fulton / Greenville, South Carolina, Attorney.

data.name: Episode 4
data.summary: 2008. After a breakdown, Niall learns that Ruben has returned. Obsession takes hold, and a charged confrontation forces the brothers to face their fractured past.

data.name: Josh Groban, Jalen Thomas Brooks, Kyle Cooke, Carl Radke, Emily Kaufman
data.summary: Kellyoke Encore: "Flowers"; Josh Groban chats and performs; Jalen Thomas Brooks; Kyle Cooke and Carl Radke ("Summer House"); road trip with Emily Kaufman, the Travel Mom; Brooke Burke.

data.name: Durand Bernarr, Scott Foley, Whitney Leavitt, LJ Benet
data.summary: Durand Bernarr chats and performs; Scott Foley; Whitney Leavitt; LJ Benet (Broadway's "The Lost Boys"); "The Lost Boys" performance.

data.name: And the World Was All Around Us
data.summary: In the series finale, Jamie and Claire must protect the home that they've made for themselves and trust in the love that binds them.

data.name: XOXO
data.summary: Graff and Bateman investigate the death of a beloved politician with a troubled past.

data.name: Crossing Family Lines and Home Is where Mom Isn't
Chasing Monsters
data.summary: A deadly threat strikes close to home, pulling Lena, Danny and the team into an intense investigation that stirs buried grief and tests their resolve. At the same time, Mae faces a political and personal reckoning, prompting a revelation that pushes Lena toward a life-changing decision.

data.name: What a Long Strange Trip It's Been
data.summary: Boyd and Jade set off on a desperate, mind-bending search for answers, while a food run to the settlement takes a chilling turn.

data.name: Defector
data.summary: The theft of a bioweapon from an unwitting defector forces the team to work with an old foe to secure the lethal pathogen and prevent an outbreak in N.Y.C.

data.name: Broken Glass
data.summary: Colin and Bill race to stop a company from covering up their intelligence theft while taking down a dangerous person from Colin's past.
